title: CyberOS SKILL.md frontmatter
description: Minimum-viable schema covering TASK-SKILL-103 + TASK-SKILL-111 + TASK-SKILL-113 + TASK-SKILL-115. Used by editor LSPs + CI gates + non-CyberOS validators. The Rust broker's `frontmatter::load_and_validate()` is the runtime source of truth; this schema mirrors the structural shape but cannot express the verb-stem + paraphrase-distinct + trigger-count rules.

name.description: kebab-case skill id; matches folder name.

description.description: WHAT + WHEN (with ≥2 quoted trigger phrases) + KEY VALUE. Flattened length must be 80-1024 chars. No XML-tag patterns (`<foo>`). Per TASK-SKILL-111 SKB-020..023. The verb-stem + ≥2-quoted-trigger checks are enforced by the Rust validator, not by this schema.

metadata.description: Flat key-value pairs. CyberOS conventions: version, module, stage, cyberos-template, cyberos-rubric-target.

allowed_memory_scopes.description: memory read/write scope globs. Per AGENTS.md §15. Globs validated by globset@0.4 at the Rust layer.

allowed_mcp_tools.description: Exhaustive list of MCP tool names this skill may invoke. The Rust broker's MCP gateway rejects unlisted tools at call time.

untrusted_inputs.description: TASK-SKILL-113 / SKB-040..042: declares the untrusted-content marker name + scan policy. Per registry v0.2.5+.

wrap_in_marker.description: v1 marker namespace per TASK-SKILL-113 §1 #2. String-form only (no XML brackets). Future markers (TASK-SKILL-117): untrusted_content_strict, untrusted_pii_redacted.

skill_version.description: SemVer. Bumped on every CHANGELOG entry.

min_broker_version.description: Broker SemVer floor — broker refuses to invoke if its version is lower.

persona.description: Owning persona slug per cuo/MODULE.md (e.g. chief-product-officer).

owner_role.description: Role enum from cuo/MODULE.md §20.1. Used by manual-fine-tune commit-access matrix per TASK-SKILL-103 §1 #16.

escalation.description: Escalation graph — to which persona/human if the skill hits a domain boundary.

depends_on_contracts.description: TASK-SKILL-103 §1 #14 contract dependencies — pinned by version + pin_path.

exposable_as.description: Per TASK-SKILL-103 §1 #15 — surfaces this skill ships through.

audit.description: Per AGENTS.md §7 — audit-log row template emitted on every concrete output.

self_audit.description: Per TASK-SKILL-092 — invariants checked at runtime + anomaly signals.

human_fine_tune.description: Per TASK-SKILL-093 — manual fine-tune commit-access matrix + signals_to_initiate.

emitted_source_freshness_tier.description: AGENTS.md §5.1 source-tier — declared on each output for downstream conflict resolution.

gated_until_phase.description: Phase gate (P0|P1|P2|P3|P4) before which the supervisor refuses to invoke.
